findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 31. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The cover letter content is duplicated in the HTML. After the formatted visual version of the letter (with NC state seal, signature, and DEQ logo), the HTML renders the entire letter again as plain text before continuing to the Annual Report title page. The PDF contains the letter only once.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows one copy of the cover letter. The HTML renders the formatted letter with images, then immediately below the DEQ logo shows 'North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality | Division of Water Resources / 512 N. Salisbury Street...' followed by the full letter text repeated (date, addressee, subject line, body paragraphs, 'Sincerely, Kevin Hart', 'Enclosures', 'cc: NCGA Fiscal Research') before reaching the 'Annual Report on Projects Funded by the Shallow Draft Navigation Channel Dredging and Aquatic Weed' heading.

findings.description: The entire Shallow Draft Navigation Channel Dredging Annual Report table from PDF page 3 (~40 data rows covering FY 2021-2022, totaling $9,543,427.32) is rendered only as an embedded image, not as an HTML table. All row-level data (dates, projects, cooperators, amounts, project types) is inaccessible as text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 contains a table with columns Date, Project, Cooperator, Amount, Project Type and approximately 40 rows (e.g., '7/14/2021 | 7956 Ocean Isle Beach | Ocean Isle | $420.00 | Channel Maintenance' through '6/27/2022 | CW24993 Emerald Isle Boat Ramp | Emerald Isle | $60,000.00 | Channel Maintenance'). The HTML renders this as: with no corresponding element.

findings.description: In the Project Cooperators table, 'Charlotte' was incorrectly split from 'Charlotte Stormwater Services' (Mountain Island Reservoir's cooperator) and appended to Lake Norman's cooperator list.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows: Lake Norman cooperators = 'Lake Norman Marine Commission, Charlotte Water,' and Mountain Island Reservoir cooperators = 'Charlotte Stormwater Services and Duke Energy'. HTML shows: Lake Norman = 'Lake Norman Marine Commission, Charlotte Water, Charlotte' and Mountain Island Reservoir = 'Stormwater Services and Duke Energy'. The word 'Charlotte' was moved from one row to the other.
